title: Democrats seek to invoke 25th Amendment against Trump
shortDescription: Democrats in Congress introduce a bill to invoke the 25th Amendment against President Donald Trump, citing national security concerns.

title: Accuser speaks as Swalwell resigns from Congress, exits governor race
shortDescription: One of Rep. Eric Swalwell's accusers spoke at a press conference alleging he sexually assaulted her. Swalwell has suspended his California governor bid and plans to resign from Congress.

title: DoorDash responds to White House delivery backlash
shortDescription: DoorDash responds to claims a White House delivery was staged, saying the Dasher is real and supports President Trump's "No tax on tips" initiatives.

title: Pentagon press policy ruled unconstitutional again by federal judge
shortDescription: The Pentagon said its revised policy addressed the court's concerns, but the judge said its "slightly different language" that had the same effect.

title: Trump's fast-food fixation with McDonald's unpacked
shortDescription: A DoorDash driver delivered McDonald's to President Donald Trump on Monday. The fast-food chain often serves as his subliminal nod to middle America.

title: 'Touch grass' How DoorDash spokesperson is defending White House visit
shortDescription: Julian Crowley, a public affairs official for DoorDash, has responded on X to people criticizing the DoorDash Grandma's delivery to the White House.

title: DHS remains shutdown. When could a vote happen next?
shortDescription: The Department of Homeland Security shutdown continues to drag on into mid-April as Congress resumes session with no agreed upon deal or scheduled vote.

title: Where will Trump's 250-foot arch stand in DC? We'll show you
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's proposed "Triumphal Arch" near Arlington National Cemetery still faces legal challenges, but here's where it could go.

title: Renderings for 'Arc to Trump' revealed
shortDescription: USA TODAY trending reporter Michelle Del Rey visited the site of the future "Arc de Trump" in Washington, D.C.

title: Eric Swalwell, Tony Gonzales and the ethics earthquake in Congress
shortDescription: An ethical reckoning has hit Capitol Hill with seven months to go until the midterm elections.

title: What is Donald Trump's approval rating? Pope attacks drew backlash
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has had a historically low approval rating for about a year. Now, he is going after Pope Leo. What do people think of the pope?

title: Young voters shun Trump, plan to vote blue in midterms, poll says
shortDescription: With the midterm primary season underway, a new national poll is measuring how the nation's youngest voters feel about Trump and the November election.

title: MAGA divide grows as Marjorie Taylor Greene talks national tax revolt
shortDescription: Former representative Marjorie Taylor Greene has promoted a national tax revolt on social media amid her opposition to the war in Iran, other issues.

title: Gov. Kemp says Democrats 'have been overperforming' ahead of midterms
shortDescription: Governor Brian Kemp sat down with Jonathan Martin with Politico at the Masters to talk midterm, 2028 elections and more. Here's what he said.

title: Congress recess stalls effort to fund Homeland Security
shortDescription: Congress remains in recess as lawmakers remain divided over how to fund the Department of Homeland Security. Disagreements over immigration enforcement funding delay a final deal.

title: Was DoorDash grandma a GOP plant? White House appearance one of many
shortDescription: Sharon Simmons, dubbed MAGA Grandma, delivered to President Donald Trump at the White House. She previously appeared with other GOP leaders.

title: Vance speaks out about Trump's Jesus post
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance said President Trump's social media post apparently portraying himself as Jesus was "a joke."

title: Christians react to Trump's Jesus post
shortDescription: A Truth Social post depicting President Donald Trump as Jesus Christ caused an uproar among Christians.

title: Daily Briefing: Two lawmakers leave Congress
shortDescription: A Republican and a Democrat exit Congress over conduct. Here is the news to know on Tuesday.

title: Carney clinches majority government in Canadian special elections
shortDescription: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney said his parliamentary majority win will help him deal more effectively with the trade war started by President Donald Trump.

title: Trump says US-Iran talks could happen in 'next two days'
shortDescription: President Trump has moved to block vessels linked to Iran from leaving the region after the country closed the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Italy's prime minister issues rare rebuke of Trump after pope attack
shortDescription: The statement represented an extremely rare public rebuke of Trump from Giorgia Meloni, underscoring widespread anger in Italy.

title: Was Trump Queen Elizabeth II’s favorite president? She wouldn’t say. | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Queen Elizabeth met 13 sitting U.S. presidents in her 70-year reign. In one way or another, she touched all of them, as they did her.
